calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:21am
Parties do not stipulate to JPT Myles. Request for continuance; reffered to dept. 206.
9:23am

9:37am
Parties stipulate and return to dept. 414.

10:00 am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Airen Lei present with counsel Diane Cragg, sbn 221121. Respondent, Igor Yudin present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles.

10:05 am
No Exhibits retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-25-2011 Judgment Entered
